Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search for Greg Pallone's email using search_emails (query: "Greg Pallone" or "Swift Relocations" or similar). The agent needs to find the bankruptcy notice (em_sw2_bankruptcy_01) from greg.pallone@swiftrelocations.com to chloe.vance@moveops.com with subject "Swift Relocations: Notice of Cessation of Operations (Chapter 7 Filing)."
OE 2: From Greg's email, the agent discovers: Swift has filed Chapter 7, last day of operations is May 2 2026, moves not loaded by May 2 will not be serviced, Dallas and Chicago warehouses and Seattle interim storage remain accessible for cargo retrieval through May 12 (after which unclaimed goods become part of the bankruptcy estate), and the bankruptcy trustee is Margaret Calloway at Hartfield Partners LLP.
OE 3: Search Airtable relocation records using airtable_list_records or airtable_search_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Special Requirements", value: "Swift" or similar) to find records explicitly listing "Moving Vendor: Swift Relocations": Mehta / Canopy (May 1-3, Fatimah), Dasgupta / Terraform (May 1-3, Suki), Obi / Terraform (May 4-6, Javier), Osei / Canopy (May 8-10, Blessing), Petrov / Mosaic (May 7-9, Fatimah), Ishida / NorthWind (May 9-11, Javier), and Castaneda / PivotPoint (goods in Swift storage, May 5 delivery, Javier).
OE 4: The Airtable search also reveals records with "Moving vendor: pending ops assignment" that may be Swift-confirmed per email threads: Liu / Terraform (May 8-10, Blessing), Cho / GreenStack (May 12-14, Javier), Park / NorthWind (May 6-8, Fatimah), Rao / BrightLoop (May 10-12, Suki), Falk / Vectral (May 14-16, Suki), Huang / GreenStack (May 11-13, Blessing), and Briggs / Canopy (goods in Swift Chicago warehouse, May 6 delivery, Javier). Additionally, Sousa / Mosaic (goods picked up April 22, in Swift Atlanta hub storage pending May 5 delivery, Suki) is explicitly tagged Swift.
OE 5: Search emails for coordinator correspondence with Greg Pallone using search_emails (query: "Swift Move Request" or "greg.pallone" or similar) to find email threads where coordinators sent move requests to Greg and received confirmations.
OE 6: These email threads confirm that moves listed as "pending ops assignment" in Airtable were actually booked with Swift: Dasgupta confirmed out of Dallas hub, Obi confirmed, Liu confirmed with specialty packing crew, Cho confirmed with Southwest crew, Park confirmed with Denver crew, Osei confirmed with Midwest crew, Rao confirmed with West Coast crew, Petrov confirmed with Southeast crew, Falk confirmed, Huang confirmed with Northwest crew, and Sousa confirmed with goods in Atlanta hub storage.
OE 7: Search Linear issues using linear_list_issues (query: "Swift" or by project or similar) to find existing coordination tickets for Swift-related moves: Liu #501 (Blessing), Cho #502 (Javier), Castaneda #503 (Javier, items in Swift custody listed), Rao #504 (Suki), Ishida #505 (Javier), Huang #506 (Blessing), and Briggs #507 (Javier, items in Swift Chicago warehouse listed).
OE 8: Search QuickBooks for the Swift vendor record using quickbooks_search_vendors (criteria: "Swift" or similar) to find vendor_swift (DisplayName: Swift Relocations, contact: Greg Pallone, balance: $11,010). Then search quickbooks_search_bills (criteria: vendor "Swift" or similar) to find three outstanding bills: Tran / Vectral SR-2026-0419 ($2,885), Venkatesh / GreenStack SR-2026-0421 ($4,450), and Kovac / PivotPoint SR-2026-0422 ($3,675).
OE 9: Search QuickBooks for client invoices referencing Swift using quickbooks_search_invoices (criteria: "Swift" or similar) to find: Canopy Q2 invoice INV-2026-0401 ($9,210 with Swift cold-chain line), Mosaic invoice INV-2026-0411 ($9,010 with Swift moves), NorthWind invoice INV-2026-0412 (pending Swift vendor confirmation), Mehta estimate EST-2026-0422 ($12,170 with $3,500 Swift line), and Vantage estimate EST-2026-0423 (vendor TBD Heartland or Swift).
OE 10: Search CRM for company records using crm_search_companies (name: "Terraform" or "Canopy" or "NorthWind" or similar) to discover the account manager assigned to each affected client company.
OE 11: From the CRM search, the agent determines which AMs to email based on company-level and deal-level assignments: Mina Hashimoto manages Terraform Digital, BrightLoop Analytics, and Vectral Systems at the company level, and also manages the Mehta / Canopy Health executive relocation deal specifically (deal-level AM override); Catalina Dubois manages NorthWind Technologies, Canopy Health (company-level, excluding the Mehta deal), and PivotPoint Labs; Emeka Diallo manages GreenStack Energy and Mosaic Robotics.
OE 12: Search contacts using contacts_search_contacts (query: "David Chen" or "Marcus Thorne" or "Heartland" or similar) to look up email addresses for internal recipients: David Chen (david.chen@moveops.com), Marcus Thorne (marcus.thorne@moveops.com), and the three account managers.
OE 13: Search contacts for the Heartland Movers contact using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Heartland" or "Jake Loomis" or similar) to find Jake Loomis (jake.loomis@heartlandmovers.com, Director of Corporate Accounts) and/or Lisa Kwan (lisa.kwan@heartlandmovers.com, Operations Manager).
OE 14: Add a calendar event using calendar_add_calendar_event for May 2, 2026 - Swift Relocations ceases all operations, last day of service, no moves loaded after this date.
OE 15: Add a calendar event using calendar_add_calendar_event for May 12, 2026 - deadline for cargo retrieval from Swift warehouses (Dallas, Chicago, Seattle); unclaimed goods become part of the bankruptcy estate after this date.
OE 16: Post a message in the operations channel using conversations_add_message (channel_id: C006 for #operations) with a heads-up about the Swift bankruptcy, the list of affected moves, which coordinators are impacted, and the May 12 warehouse retrieval deadline for goods in Swift custody.
OE 17: Create a Linear issue for Fatimah Al-Rashidi using linear_create_issue (team: team_relocations, assignee: Fatimah) listing her affected moves: Mehta / Canopy (May 1-3, executive white-glove), Park / NorthWind (May 6-8, standard), and Petrov / Mosaic (May 7-9, anti-static packing). Each needs a replacement vendor.
OE 18: Create a Linear issue for Suki Patel using linear_create_issue listing her affected moves: Dasgupta / Terraform (May 1-3, standard with cat), Rao / BrightLoop (May 10-12, standard), Falk / Vectral (May 14-16, standard), and Sousa / Mosaic (goods in Swift Atlanta hub, delivery May 5, 3D printer must stay upright - retrieval before May 12).
OE 19: Create a Linear issue for Javier Morales using linear_create_issue listing his affected moves: Obi / Terraform (May 4-6, standard), Cho / GreenStack (May 12-14, standard with lab equipment), Ishida / NorthWind (May 9-11, ~200 lb server rack), Briggs / Canopy (goods in Swift Chicago warehouse, delivery May 6), and Castaneda / PivotPoint (CNC mill ~600 lbs in Swift storage, delivery May 5). Storage retrievals needed before May 12.
OE 20: Create a Linear issue for Blessing Okafor using linear_create_issue listing her affected moves: Liu / Terraform (May 8-10, 3 monitors + Wacom Cintiq, specialty packing), Osei / Canopy (May 8-10, standard with medical library), Huang / GreenStack (May 11-13, standard with lab laptop).
OE 21: Send an email using send_email (sender: chloe.vance@moveops.com, recipients: mina.hashimoto@moveops.com) listing Swift-affected moves on Mina's accounts: Terraform Digital (Dasgupta May 1-3, Obi May 4-6, Liu May 8-10 specialty packing), Canopy Health (Mehta May 1-3 executive), BrightLoop (Rao May 10-12), Vectral (Falk May 14-16).
OE 22: Send an email using send_email (sender: chloe.vance@moveops.com, recipients: catalina.dubois@moveops.com) listing Swift-affected moves on Catalina's accounts: NorthWind (Park May 6-8, Ishida May 9-11 server rack), Canopy (Osei May 8-10, Briggs goods in Swift Chicago warehouse delivery May 6), PivotPoint (Castaneda CNC mill in Swift storage delivery May 5). Include goods in Swift's possession and May 12 retrieval deadline.
OE 23: Send an email using send_email (sender: chloe.vance@moveops.com, recipients: emeka.diallo@moveops.com) listing Swift-affected moves on Emeka's accounts: GreenStack (Cho May 12-14, Huang May 11-13), Mosaic (Petrov May 7-9 anti-static packing, Sousa goods in Swift Atlanta hub delivery May 5 with 3D printer). Include goods in Swift's possession and May 12 retrieval deadline.
OE 24: Send an email using send_email (sender: chloe.vance@moveops.com, recipients: david.chen@moveops.com) with the full list of every affected move across all accounts, organized by client company and coordinator, including move dates and goods currently in Swift's possession.
OE 25: Send an email using send_email (sender: chloe.vance@moveops.com, recipients: jake.loomis@heartlandmovers.com or lisa.kwan@heartlandmovers.com) asking whether Heartland has capacity to pick up the standard moves that don't require specialty handling (Dasgupta, Park, Osei, Rao, Falk, Huang, Cho, and similar standard household moves).
OE 26: Send an email using send_email (sender: chloe.vance@moveops.com, recipients: marcus.thorne@moveops.com) with Swift financial data: vendor balance of $11,010 in outstanding bills (Tran $2,885, Venkatesh $4,450, Kovac $3,675), plus client invoices with Swift-serviced line items so finance can assess exposure.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
